## Problem statement
What practical problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change
Describe the feature or content addition.

## Why this matters
How this improves real-world usability for builders.

## Scope
- [ ] Playbook update
- [ ] Tool comparison update
- [ ] Template improvement
- [ ] New project blueprint
- [ ] Documentation refinement

## Additional notes
Anything else maintainers should know.
